_note: Synthetic, demo-safe sample data. No real personal receipts are stored here. The LIVE WorkIQ path returns the presenter's actual email receipts at demo time; this captured file exists only so the demo is reliable offline. Geography is real San Francisco, but the traveler, dates, fares and email metadata are fabricated for the demo.
tripLabel: Contoso Engineering Summit — San Francisco (sample trip)
mailboxQuery: Uber ride receipts from the last 3 weeks
rawText:
Here is a structured extraction of Uber ride receipts from your email over the past ~3 weeks. I deduplicated overlapping forwards and kept only distinct rides.

1) Tue, May 26 2026, 11:18 AM — Pickup: San Francisco International Airport (SFO), Harvey Milk Terminal 1 — Dropoff: 335 Powell St, San Francisco, CA 94102 — Total: $60.40
2) Tue, May 26 2026, 7:05 PM — Pickup: 335 Powell St — Dropoff: 1 Ferry Building, San Francisco, CA 94111 — Total: $15.30
3) Wed, May 27 2026, 8:32 AM — Pickup: 335 Powell St — Dropoff: 415 Mission St, San Francisco, CA 94105 — Total: $12.30
4) Wed, May 27 2026, 7:12 PM — Pickup: 415 Mission St — Dropoff: 500 Brannan St, San Francisco, CA 94107 — Total: $14.50
5) Thu, May 28 2026, 8:55 AM — Pickup: 335 Powell St — Dropoff: 747 Howard St (Moscone Center), San Francisco, CA 94103 — Total: $10.90
6) Thu, May 28 2026, 8:10 PM — Pickup: 747 Howard St — Dropoff: 1570 Stockton St, San Francisco, CA 94133 — Total: $19.70
7) Fri, May 29 2026, 9:10 AM — Pickup: 335 Powell St — Dropoff: 101 California St, San Francisco, CA 94111 — Total: $11.70
8) Mon, Jun 1 2026, 7:35 PM — Pickup: 234 Townsend St, San Francisco, CA 94107 — Dropoff: 900 N Point St, San Francisco, CA 94109 — Total: $32.98
9) Tue, Jun 2 2026, 6:23 PM — Pickup: 900 N Point St — Dropoff: San Francisco International Airport (SFO), Harvey Milk Terminal 1 — Total: $49.98

Combined total: $227.76 across 9 rides.
